message:
feat(update): Add cache and backup metadata types for self-updater

Introduce data structures to support caching version checks and
managing backup entries for the self-updater:

- CachedCheck: Stores version check results with timestamp for
  24-hour cache validity (reduces GitHub API calls)
- BackupEntry: Metadata for rollback backups including version,
  timestamp, and paths
- CACHE_DURATION and MAX_BACKUPS constants for configuration

These types enable the upcoming cached update check and automatic
rollback features in rch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
